summary: Executed backend + frontend validation for the new technical configurator phase on public preview URL. Verified API technical fields, Oficina+Siemon coherent BOM baseline, desktop dashboard usability, mobile WhatsApp flow behavior, unavailable-combination handling, PDF preview trigger, and WhatsApp message generation with selected items.

minor.issue: Some available combinations can return partial accessories (e.g., missing jack/patch_cord) when no compatible stock exists; UI handles it with 'Sin producto', but commercial expectations may require stricter completeness rules.

action_items: Optional product decision: define whether an 'available' bundle must require full accessory set (jack/faceplate/patch_cord/patch_panel) or can remain partial based on stock.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical defects found in reviewed files for requested scope.
Frontend continues to use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly and data-testid coverage is adequate for stable E2E testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://network-bom-tool.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest suite updated to technical-rule contract (7 tests, all pass). UI automated checks confirmed desktop right-panel workflow, review-item toggling, PDF blob URL opening, and wa.me URL generation with selected items. Mobile flow verified without WhatsApp-step blocking after configuration.
rca of the issue: Earlier backend test failure was caused by stale assertion expecting accessory ratio field in API payload. Root cause: test suite out of sync with revised contract where ratio is null/unused. Mitigation applied by updating tests to assert new technical_rule and availability fields plus BOM coherence rules.
